sentences.arabic: أَطْلَقَتْ شَرِكَةٌ تِكْنُولُوجِيَّةٌ كَبِيرَةٌ تَطْبِيقًا جَدِيدًا لِلْهَوَاتِفِ الذَّكِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Velika tehnološka kompanija lansirala je novu aplikaciju za pametne telefone.
sentences.translationEn: A large technology company launched a new smartphone application.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ هَذَا التَّطْبِيقُ الْمُسْتَخْدِمِينَ عَلَى تَنْظِيمِ وَقْتِهِمْ بِشَكْلٍ أَفْضَلَ.
sentences.translation: Ova aplikacija pomaže korisnicima da bolje organizuju svoje vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: This app helps users organize their time better.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُ لِلنَّاسِ كِتَابَةُ مَهَامِّهِمُ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ وَتَلَقِّي تَنْبِيهَاتٍ سَرِيعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi mogu zapisivati svoje dnevne zadatke i primati brza obavještenja.
sentences.translationEn: People can write down their daily tasks and receive quick notifications.

sentences.arabic: حَمَّلَ مَلَايِينُ الْأَشْخَاصِ التَّطْبِيقَ فِي الْأُسْبُوعِ الْأَوَّلِ فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: Milioni ljudi su preuzeli aplikaciju samo u prvoj sedmici.
sentences.translationEn: Millions of people downloaded the app in the first week alone.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ الْخُبَرَاءُ إِنَّ هَذِهِ التِّكْنُولُوجِيَا سَتُغَيِّرُ حَيَاةَ الْكَثِيرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Stručnjaci kažu da će ova tehnologija promijeniti živote mnogih.
sentences.translationEn: Experts say this technology will change many people's lives.
